name: Hot Marmalade Soy Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marmalade, lemon juice, soy sauce, garlic, and ginger in a bowl.
2. Heat the mixture to boiling point.
3. Dissolve the cornstarch in the cold water.
4. Gradually add the cornstarch solution to the hot sauce while stirring constantly.
5. Cook until thickened.
6. Serve hot.
